blocked_tasks.title: Extract agent-agnostic application use cases behind ports
blocked_tasks.reason: Core is Pi-free and ports/rebuild seams exist; Pi adapter wraps tools/commands/UI. Full application use-case extraction for state, task, session, heartbeat, setup/bootstrap remains incomplete and should be replanned as a focused follow-up.

blocked_tasks.title: Prove the adapter seam with a minimal CLI surface
blocked_tasks.reason: Only Pi is a real adapter. Application/core seams are improved, but no minimal CLI adapter exists and no CLI fixture test proves shared application behavior.
